source.note: Sample fixture matching the amended v1 schema so Codex Phase 2 can develop and test the runtime loader in parallel with Claude Phase 1 generators. Replace with real generator output — same shape, richer content, real sha256 fingerprints, real sourceBytes.

properties.description: The brand(s) associated with a product or service, or the brand(s) maintained by an organization or business person.
A Global Trade Item Number (GTIN). GTINs identify trade items, including products and services, using numeric identification codes.
A material that something is made from, e.g. leather, wool, cotton, paper.
The model of the product. Use with the URL of a ProductModel or a textual representation of the model identifier.

A standardized size of a product or creative work, specified either through a simple textual string (for example 'XL', '32Wx34L'), a QuantitativeValue with a unitCode, or a comprehensive and structured SizeSpecification.
The Stock Keeping Unit (SKU), i.e. a merchant-specific identifier for a product or service, or the product to which the offer refers.
The weight of the product or person.
